lines: Mukiza, ni Wowe zuba ryanjye Nta joro ngir’ iyo turi kumwe. Iby'isi bye kub’ igicu Kinkingiriz' umucyo wawe !
Kand' iyo mbony' ibitotsi byiza, Bikanduhur' umubir' urushye,Nibuke yuko mw
Tujye tuguman’ umunsi wire, Kuko ntabaho tutari kumwe;Tugumane na
Niba hagiz' uwasuzuguye Ijwi ry'Imana kur'uyu munsi,Tangira none,
Mwam' abarwayi, mubane maso, Uh' abaken' imigisha myinshi,Kand' abapfushije
Kandi, Yesu, tuzakangukane, Dukor' imirimo, turi kumwe,Nyuma tuzajye mw ijuru
